content:
# 12 Best AI Tools for Students in 2026 — Study Smarter, Not Harder

Hey students! Ready to save HOURS on homework and studying? Here are our top AI picks for 2026! 🚀

For more tools, check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]] and [[link:/category/Writing|Writing category]]!

---

## 1. Rytr (Best for Essay Writing)

[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] helps you write essays, research summaries, and even citations! Super budget-friendly at $9/month! 💸

---

## 2. Notion AI (Best for Notes & Organization)

[[link:/tools/100|Notion AI]] summarizes long readings, generates study guides, and keeps your notes organized! 📚

---

## 3. Grammarly (Best for Proofreading)

Catch grammar mistakes and improve your writing before you turn in assignments! ✍️

---

## 4. Todoist AI (Best for Time Management)

Prioritize assignments, plan study sessions, and stay on top of deadlines! ⏰

---

## Our Final Tip

Always use AI responsibly — it's a tool to help you learn, not cheat! 😊

Prefer a cheaper writing tool? Try our own AI writer → [[link:/writer|/writer]]

Discover more Productivity tools → [[link:/category/Productivity|/category/Productivity]]
